name: Kids' Machine Washable Medium Density Bed Pillow - Pillowfort™: Hypoallergenic Toddler Pillow, Universal Sleeper, OEKO-TEX Certified
description:
Whether your child is transitioning from crib to bed or just needs a bedding refresh, this Bed Pillow from Pillowfort™ provides them with an incredibly comfortable place to lay their head. It's machine washable to keep it fresh and clean — simply add your kiddo's favorite pillowcase to create a place where they love to curl up and head off to dreamland. It is for the transition from Toddler Pillow to Adult Pillow, perfectly sized and filled to the comfort of your child's head. Fits inside standard pillow cases.

We’re committed to making products better for you, and the world. This product is Standard 100 by OEKO-TEX certified, meaning that everything from the dyes and fabrics to accessories like buttons and zippers are tested and verified as free from harmful levels of more than 300 substances.
